spec_match.rationale: The three production patterns still demonstrate :has(audio:playing), video state sibling selectors, and playlist highlighting with media pseudo-classes.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP exercised the music, video, and playlist tabs, confirming local asset playback, advancing currentTime, and CSS-owned :playing/:paused/:muted state visuals in all three patterns.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still matches the feature blurb: CSS owns the visual playback state while the native media elements own playback.

edge_cases.rationale: The video overlay restored after pause, the mute badge became visible while muted, WebM/MP4 fallback sources remain present, and Chrome DevTools MCP reported clean console/network output.

references.rationale: The page includes ChromeStatus, Selectors Level 4, and MDN references.

design_system.rationale: No new raw colors were introduced and the existing compact tabbed layout remains intact.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP verified all three production patterns, local asset playback, CSS-only media state visuals, and clean console/network output.
